observations.summary: The sound described is not merely fear but the awakening to a painful truth that has been avoided for seven years, illustrating the tension between facing reality and running from it.

left_evidence.quote: It was not a scream of fear, exactly—though fear was certainly part of it.

right_evidence.quote: It was the sound of a man waking from a dream that had shown him something true, and truth, when you've been running from it for seven years, hits like a fist to the solar plexus.
